items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aims to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the expected behavior or outcome of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific functionality of waitlisting for sold-out events, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
